ScheduleMe delivers pre-qualified, AI-triaged leads that match your exact service and location. You pay only for leads you receive — no setup fees, no lock-in.

Why Join

Built for businesses
that want to grow.

We handle the marketing. You handle the work.

  • Pre-qualified leads only

    Every request has been triaged by AI. You only see leads that match your exact service category and location.

  • Real-time notifications

    Get SMS and email alerts the moment a matching lead comes in. First to respond wins the booking.

  • Business dashboard

    Track leads, manage your profile, see your reviews, and monitor your conversion rate — all in one place.

  • Pay only for leads

    No monthly subscription to start. Pay a flat fee per lead received. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.

  • Build your reputation

    Verified reviews from real customers on every booking. Strong ratings mean more prominent placement.

  • Own your territory

    Category and location exclusivity on Pro. Once you claim your area, no competitors can bid on the same leads.

How It Works

Up and running
in 24 hours.

  1. 1

    Create your profile

    Tell us about your business — service type, coverage area, availability, and license info. Takes about 5 minutes.

  2. 2

    Get verified

    We run a quick license and background check. Most businesses are approved within 24 hours.

  3. 3

    Receive matched leads

    When a customer requests your service in your area, you get an instant alert with their details and AI triage summary.

  4. 4

    Win the booking

    Call the customer directly. No middleman, no commission. The booking — and the relationship — is yours.

Pricing

Pay only for what you get

Start free with $8 per lead, or go unlimited with Pro at $79/month.
No contracts, no hidden fees.

View Full Pricing →
FAQ

Common questions

How much does it cost?
You start free — no setup fees. On the Starter plan, you pay $8 per lead received. Pro plan ($79/mo) gives you unlimited leads, priority placement, and territory exclusivity.
What service categories do you support?
Plumbing, HVAC, electrical, automotive, home repair, cleaning, salon/beauty, landscaping, pest control, and more. We add new categories every quarter.
How are leads matched to my business?
Our AI triages each customer request and scores it against your service category, location radius, and availability. You only see leads that are genuinely relevant.
Can I set my own service area?
Yes. During onboarding you set your coverage radius. You can adjust this anytime from your dashboard.
What if a lead is bad quality?
If a lead does not match your profile or the contact info is invalid, report it within 48 hours for a full credit — no questions asked.
How quickly will I be approved?
Most businesses are reviewed and approved within 24 hours. We verify your license number and run a background check on the primary contact.

Ready to grow your business?

Join free in 5 minutes. No credit card, no commitment.
Start receiving leads within 24 hours of approval.
